title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy machine learning pipelines, train models, optimize inference, and collaborate with product teams to ship AI features.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze structured and unstructured data, build predictive models, create dashboards, and communicate insights to stakeholders.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Design natural language processing systems, create text embeddings, fine-tune transformer models, and evaluate language understanding workflows.

title: AI Product Engineer
description: Build AI-first product features, integrate LLM APIs, ship retrieval systems, and work across backend, frontend, and prompt design.

title: Backend Python Developer
description: Develop backend services, maintain APIs, optimize database access, and build reliable integrations for production systems.

title: Data Engineer
description: Create robust data pipelines, manage ETL workflows, process large datasets, and ensure data quality for analytics and machine learning teams.
